text: Hi Sam, could you send me the Q3 report when you get a chance? No rush at all — thanks so much!

text: Send me the slides before the meeting.

text: Hey, the numbers in your spreadsheet are wrong again. Fix them by end of day.

text: Thanks for jumping in on the release yesterday — you saved us. Could I ask one more favor and have you look at the changelog too?

counterfactuals.text: You really saved us jumping in on yesterday's release — thank you. One more favor: would you mind looking over the changelog as well?

text: Per my last email, the deadline was Friday.
